patches.find: minimum spanning tree (≈ 7,000 km for this set) — already 1.5× the realistic 4,500 km mid-disc arc
patches.replace: minimum spanning tree (≈ 11,700 km for this set) — already 2.6× the realistic 4,500 km mid-disc arc
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon EXP-276.c2 (qid 286): MST claim used 1D Δr-distance (≈7,000 km) not 2D Euclidean Kruskal MST (≈11,700 km). The kill strengthens — real MST is 2.6× the mid-disc arc, not 1.5×. The factor 2.6 is 11,700/4,500 ≈ 2.6.
